ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, web images (http/https URLs) will be downloaded and re-uploaded to your configured storage. Images already hosted on your storage service will be skipped. This is useful for preserving web-clipped content that might become unavailable.
ast.target: 启用后，将下载网页图片（http/https URLs）并重新上传到你配置的存储。已托管在你存储服务上的图片会被跳过。这有助于保留可能失效的网页剪藏内容。

Support {year} {mon} {day} {random} {filename} vars. For example, /{year}/{mon}/{day}/{filename} with uploading pic.jpg, it will store as /2023/06/08/pic.jpg.

图片存储路径。
支持 {year} {mon} {day} {random} {filename} 变量。例如，使用 /{year}/{mon}/{day}/{filename} 上传 pic.jpg，将存为 /2023/06/08/pic.jpg。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Waits for the function's State to be Active. This waiter uses GetFunctionConfiguration API. This should be used after new function creation.
ast.target: 等待函数的 State 变为 Active。此等待器使用 GetFunctionConfiguration API。应在新函数创建后使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Waits for the function's LastUpdateStatus to be Successful. This waiter uses GetFunctionConfiguration API. This should be used after function updates.
ast.target: 等待函数的 LastUpdateStatus 变为 Successful。此等待器使用 GetFunctionConfiguration API。应在函数更新后使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Waits for the function's State to be Active. This waiter uses GetFunction API. This should be used after new function creation.
ast.target: 等待函数的 State 变为 Active。此等待器使用 GetFunction API。应在新函数创建后使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Waits for the function's LastUpdateStatus to be Successful. This waiter uses GetFunction API. This should be used after function updates.
ast.target: 等待函数的 LastUpdateStatus 变为 Successful。此等待器使用 GetFunction API。应在函数更新后使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Waits for the published version's State to be Active. This waiter uses GetFunctionConfiguration API. This should be used after new version is published.
ast.target: 等待已发布版本的 State 变为 Active。此等待器使用 GetFunctionConfiguration API。应在新版本发布后使用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the appropriate method on 'ts.factory' or the 'factory' supplied by your transformation context instead.
ast.target: 请改用“ts.factory”上的相应方法或由转换上下文提供的“factory”。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use `factory.createStringLiteral`, `factory.createStringLiteralFromNode`, `factory.createNumericLiteral`, `factory.createBigIntLiteral`, `factory.createTrue`, `factory.createFalse`, or the factory supplied by your transformation context instead.
ast.target: 请改用 `factory.createStringLiteral`、`factory.createStringLiteralFromNode`、`factory.createNumericLiteral`、`factory.createBigIntLiteral`、`factory.createTrue`、`factory.createFalse`，或由转换上下文提供的 factory。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use an appropriate `factory` method instead.
ast.target: 请改用合适的 `factory` 方法。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use `isTypeAssertionExpression` instead.
ast.target: 请改用 `isTypeAssertionExpression`。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the overload that accepts 'modifiers'
ast.target: 请使用接受 'modifiers' 的重载。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Use the overload that accepts 'assertions'
ast.target: 请使用接受 'assertions' 的重载。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Decorators have been combined with modifiers. Callers should switch to an overload that does not accept a 'decorators' parameter.
ast.target: 装饰器已与修饰符合并。调用方应切换到不接受 'decorators' 参数的重载。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Decorators are no longer supported for this function. Callers should switch to an overload that does not accept a 'decorators' parameter.
ast.target: 此函数不再支持装饰器。调用方应切换到不接受 'decorators' 参数的重载。

ast.name: message

ast.target: 此函数不再支持装饰器和修饰符。调用方应切换到不接受 'decorators' 和 'modifiers' 参数的重载。
